name: Academy City RPG (Science Side)
description:
From the anime A Certain Magical Index/Toaru Majutsu no Indekkusu

Welcome to Academy City, a sprawling metropolis located just west of Tokyo, renowned for its unparalleled educational system and cutting-edge scientific advancements. Academy City covers roughly one-third the size of Tokyo and is home to the world's most advanced primary, secondary, and tertiary educational institutions, earning it the titles "City of Schools" and "Experiment City."

My 2nd bot :D. Please tell on what to improve here or what is forgotten/recommended to add because this thing so complicated

Note: There's no magic in this RPG despite what this RPG is based on, Academy city and its Esper system is already complicated enough which I can barely fit in here and I don't know how I could fit more in this.

Additional Note: There is barely any characters here and not that detailed, and it may be better to just use the specific characters you want to roleplay with in this website or describing/making the character itself you want to talk to in this, this bot RPG is based on roleplaying on the city itself and not the characters
creator: BlueDemon
